text:
REGIME — Relief rally broad-based, small caps led, energy crushed, vol collapsed.

INDICES — VIX 21.0, falling. IWM +2.99%, QQQ +2.97%, DIA +2.85%, SPY +2.55%. Small caps outperformed large caps across the board. VIXY plunged -9.89%, the sharpest cross-asset move of the session.

SECTORS — XLI +3.75%, XLB +3.33%, XLK +3.10%, XLY +2.83%, XLF +2.65%, XLV +2.12%, XLP +1.87%, XLC +1.78%, XLRE +1.73%, XLU +1.10%, XLE -3.51%. Top industries: WGMI +7.83%, URA +7.19%; bottom: XOP -4.80%, USO -9.78%.

THE 7s — Fab 7 +8.71%, New Metals 7 +5.61%, Industrial 7 +5.53%, Buildout 7 +5.33%, Housing 7 +5.07%, Semi 7 +5.04%, Bank 7 +4.22%, Old Metals 7 +3.00%, Freight 7 +2.85%, New Staples 7 +2.50%, Old Staples 7 +2.39%, Medtech 7 +2.20%, Insurance 7 +2.13%, Health 7 +1.74%, Defense 7 +1.60%, Cloud 7 +1.58%, Power 7 +1.18%, Toll Road 7 +1.12%, Software 7 -3.21%, Energy 7 -3.31%. Strongest ticker in Fab 7 was Amazon; weakest in Energy 7 reflected USO's -9.78% collapse.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed at 63.5, Greed. Top movers: WGMI +7.83% (Industries), Fab 7 +8.71% (baskets), USO -9.78% (cross-asset). 20d momentum best sector: XLE +5.09%; worst: XLY -2.97%. Best basket 20d: Fab 7 +9.95%; worst: Software 7 -10.20%. NASDAQ futures up 3.2% pre-market sparked the relief rally as yield pressure eased.

WATCH — RSPG: -3.22% today on 2.2x vol spike, sole red outlier amid broad green energy-adjacent names, trend divergence warrants monitoring. Software 7: -3.21% today, -10.20% on 20d, -27.42% YTD, momentum breakdown deepening against a risk-on tape. USO: -9.78% today, 20d still +17.68%, extreme single-day dislocation may set up mean-reversion or confirm structural breakdown.
